---
title: "Creators"
---

```{=html}
<p>All model creators in the M@TE catalogue, listed alphabetically by family name.</p>

<ul class="creator-list">
  <li><a href="/creators/diane-arcay.html">Diane Arcay</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/paul-d-bons.html">Paul D. Bons</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/bénédicte-cenki-tok-or-cenki.html">Bénédicte Cenki-Tok or Cenki</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/ben-s-knight.html">Ben S. Knight</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/louis-moresi.html">Louis Moresi</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/patrice-rey.html">Patrice Rey</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/till-sachau.html">Till Sachau</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/r-willem-vervoort.html">R. Willem Vervoort</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>
  <li><a href="/creators/haibin-yang.html">Haibin Yang</a> <small>(1 model)</small></li>

</ul>
```
